price: und sagten: Sollen wir denn wahrlich unsere Götter verlassen wegen eines besessenen Dichters?
arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٖ مَّجۡنُونِۭ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wayaqūlūna a-innā latārikū ālihatinā lishāʿirin majnūnin
